3206900.name: VELLUM QUEST 〜神の残滓〜
3206900.description:
This game is RPG where the world is composed of a “single screen” modeled after parchment. There are no map transitions, and all events progress continuously.

● As a knight of the Kingdom of Chandria tasked with defeating the Demon King, you are commanded by the king and will be swept up in a great destiny.

● Player Actions The ending changes based on the “Karma System,” where “Karma Points” increase or decrease depending on good or evil deeds.

● Quests scattered throughout a highly free world. Characters are strengthened by solving events placed on the map. Even in places that seem to have nothing, there might be unexpected hidden items?

※ This game is an expanded version of the free game VELLUM QUEST, released in 2021. It adds new dungeons like the “Tower of Remnants,” new equipment, monsters, and endings.

● Estimated completion time: 10 hours
